steps.title: Identify the contrasting trends
steps.content: The Czech Republic line drops sharply from roughly 225 to 75, while Austria's line declines slightly from roughly 125 to 100.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B captures the key contrast: Czech Republic decreased significantly while Austria remained relatively steady.

The other choices either incorrectly claim stability in both countries, misidentify Austria, or reverse the Czech Republic's direction.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
